name: Red Soldier Ant Buggy
description: The early-game hauling mount of Grounded 2. It hatches in the Hatchery from 1 Red Soldier Ant Egg, 2 Grub Hide, 3 Sprig, and 1 Acorn Shell, then excels at hauling materials, pushing through tight tunnels, and fighting with simple but practical aggression.
behavior: It follows the player passively until ordered otherwise and automatically joins combat when something threatens its rider. Its pattern is straightforward: bite, rush, and bully targets in close quarters, making it feel like a working mount before a technical one.
interactionWithPlayer: It can carry up to 12 hauling objects or 1 egg separate from the player, lets you build while mounted, and can throw whatever it is holding in its jaws. Near a Red Worker Ant it can also recruit a worker to follow the mount and fight beside you.
interactionWithCreatures: Red ants ignore it unless there is friendly fire, and the recruited worker inherits that same alliance. Outside the colony it behaves like a territorial mount, reacting quickly to any creature that gets in its path.
strategy: It is the best option for early progression and for moving base materials through narrow routes. Recruit a worker before longer fights, use the rush to create space, and save the throw command for eggs, resources, or finishing off smaller targets.
respawnInfo: Incubation: 12 hours inside the Hatchery. Only one buggy can be active at a time. If you do not revive it within 90 seconds, it returns to its nest and becomes unavailable for 5 minutes.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Basic bite, 3-hit bite combo, and a frontal charge. It can also throw objects carried in its jaws.

inflicts: Its bites and rushes deal chopping damage.
specialTraits: Can transport 12 hauling objects or 1 egg.
Breaks dead roots and fits through narrow tunnels.

abilities.name: Recruit Worker Ant
abilities.description: Near a Red Worker Ant, it forces the ant to serve the player. The worker follows the mount and fights beside it. Costs 2 stamina bars.

abilities.name: Carry / Throw
abilities.description: Grabs an object in its jaws and, while mounted, can be ordered to throw it forward.

abilities.name: Mandible Bite
abilities.description: A fast short-range attack used to keep steady pressure.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Mandible Combo
abilities.description: A short series that chains multiple bites when the target stays in front.

abilities.name: Charging Ram
abilities.description: A straight charge used to push, make space, or start a fight with momentum.
